prompt:
I want to create a content piece about 'Hidden LGBTQ+ Travel Gems in Southeast Asia' for OutAtlas. I'm posting this across Instagram Feed (carousel), YouTube Long-form, and Pinterest. I want different angles for each platform:

- Instagram Feed (carousel): Story-focused, visual, personal recommendation
- YouTube Long-form: SEO-optimized with chapters and timestamps
- Pinterest: Keyword-rich, planning-focused

The goal is to drive awareness and app signups. The asset is a curated photo carousel from actual travel. Write all three platform captions with proper formatting.

assertions.name: Instagram Feed carousel caption teases the swipe
assertions.description: First line should tease 'swipe for [X]' to drive carousel interaction

assertions.name: Instagram caption uses line breaks for readability
assertions.description: Short paragraphs and line breaks optimize for mobile reading

assertions.name: YouTube Long-form title is SEO-optimized and 60-70 chars
assertions.description: Front-loaded keyword, curiosity gap, sentence case

assertions.name: YouTube description includes chapters with timestamps
YouTube description includes links section with resources
assertions.description: Links to OutAtlas app, waitlist, social media with emojis

assertions.name: Pinterest pin title is 75-100 chars and descriptive
Pinterest description naturally includes keywords
assertions.description: 150-300 chars with natural keyword placement, 2-3 sentences

assertions.name: All 3 captions maintain OutAtlas warm/knowledgeable voice
assertions.description: Consistent brand voice across all platforms

assertions.name: All captions drive toward app signups per goal
assertions.description: Each caption should include CTA toward OutAtlas app or waitlist
